text: {"type":"CODE_BUILDER","title":"","lessonText":"Let's write a simple Python program to print a message and explore additional challenges.","data":{"codeBuilder":{"avatarInstruction":"Write a program that prints 'Hello, World!' to the console, then modify it to print your name and a favorite quote.","title":"Interactive Coding","goal":"Complete the code by choosing the correct pieces and add your own modifications.","expectedOutput":"","lines":[{"content":"___","correctValue":"print('Hello, World!')"},{"content":"___","correctValue":"print('My name is [Your Name].')"},{"content":"___","correctValue":"print('My favorite quote is: [Your Quote].')"}],"options":["print('Hello, World!')","echo 'Hello, World!'","console.log('Hello, World!')","write('Hello, World!')","print('My name is [Your Name].')","echo 'My name is [Your Name].'","console.log('My name is [Your Name].')","write('My name is [Your Name].')","print('My favorite quote is: [Your Quote].')","echo 'My favorite quote is: [Your Quote].'","console.log('My favorite quote is: [Your Quote].')","write('My favorite quote is: [Your Quote].')"]}}}
